description: Modify a single node by ID.

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Assign the group name s1 in slot s2 (if supplied) to the node. The node is removed from the group/slot if remove is present. If the slot keyword is omitted, the slot is set to the slot named Default.

keywords.name: merge
keywords.description: Merge the node with node i2 (node ID positive integer).

keywords.name: move-to
keywords.description: Moves the node to location v3, 3D coordinate vector (u,v,w). If supplied, merge-tolerance f will be used as a tolerance for merging nodes during moving.
